case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. STANFORD HEALTH CARE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,754.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD HEALTH CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT STANFORD HEALTH CARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
